default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss client updates and upcoming tasks across multiple projects.](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several clients (Lovable, Rimkus, Otto) are in early stages, awaiting feedback or scheduling deep dives](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [HockeyStack requires immediate content production; new keyword research and assignments are being prepared](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Udemy is transitioning to a new team member (Katya), with recent progress on aligning stakeholders and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Multiple clients (Deepgram, Understory, Ambient AI) are in various stages of content review and production](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates: Lovable and Rimkus

  - [Lovable: Awaiting artifact review, scheduling deep dives with key stakeholders](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Rimkus: Need to review artifacts, editorial focus, awaiting product deep dive scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Both clients require follow-up to maintain communication flow and progress](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)

### Otto and Logic Projects

  - [Otto: Content strategy prepared, similar to Enjin (travel space)](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Logic: Strategy approved, Kavishka to start keyword research by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Focus on low-volume keywords for Logic due to low domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### HockeyStack Content Production

  - [Urgent need for content publication](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Aida compiling internal documentation for refined keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Kavishka handling feedback on calibration blog](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Planning to deliver comparison article and refresh 2 blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Deepgram and Understory Progress

  - [Deepgram: Calibration article finalized, awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Understory: Meeting scheduled, blog setup is a priority](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Udemy Project Transition

  - [Matt transitioning Udemy to Katya on Monday](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Project now focusing on Udemy Business blog content](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Currently at calibration stage after 6 weeks of stakeholder alignment](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

### Ambient AI and Clerk Updates

  - [Ambient AI: 4 articles awaiting review, transitioning to new pod](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
  - [Clerk: 1 blog ready for delivery, another under review](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### Sentinel-1 Project

  - [Tamara delivered 5 blogs, Sydney editing for delivery](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to submit Linear ticket for Deepgram programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [Kavishka to start Logic keyword research by Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

  - [Aida to send formal notification to Udemy about moving to phase two](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Tamara to begin keyword research for Otto project](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Team to continue content production and review processes for various clients](https://fathom.video/share/dtJ3cYNJMW5sT5wWpxLxk1b4JMfKMrSc?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)

action_items.description: Complete Logic keyword research by Tue. Focus on zero/low volume keywords. Include top of funnel terms (workflow automation platforms, tools, etc).
Review Deepgram calibration article on Mon
Submit linear ticket for Deepgram programmatic SEO
Ask Bridget re prioritization of Raze vs. Understory blog setup
Hand off Udemy to Katya on Mon. Include Ifeoluwa in handover meeting.
Edit max possible Sentinel blogs for delivery today
Slack Udemy confirming transition to phase 2 w/ Matt & Jacob
Start Auto keyword research using Notion doc process
